function.name: ligandai_design_peptide
function.description: Generate peptide binders against a target gene or PDB ID using LigandForge v6.5 + Boltz-2. Server-enforced tier caps: free=10, basic=100, academia=300, pro=300, enterprise=1000. Returns a session_id you must poll with ligandai_get_job.

target_chains.description: Restrict design+fold to specific chain(s) of the receptor

variant_id.description: Use a previously-uploaded custom PDB/CIF as the receptor

function.name: ligandai_get_job
function.description: Poll a generation or fold session for status and top-N results. Returns iPSAE / iPTM / predicted Kd per peptide.

function.name: ligandai_estimate_cost
function.description: Estimate credits + USD before submitting a generation/fold run.

function.name: ligandai_get_credits
function.description: Return current credit balance, tier, and 30-day burn rate.

function.name: ligandai_resolve_pdb
function.description: Resolve a PDB ID or gene to chain layout / source / canonical structure. Use this BEFORE submitting design when the user gave a PDB id, not a gene name.

function.name: ligandai_upload_pdb
function.description: Upload a custom PDB/CIF on disk so it can be used as the receptor in subsequent generation calls. Returns variant_id.

file_path.description: Absolute path to .pdb or .cif on the agent's filesystem

gene.description: Symbolic name to attach to the uploaded structure

function.name: ligandai_search_peptides
function.description: Cross-program peptide search by score thresholds. ALL filters AND-combine. Free tier: sequences are masked, polyalanine PDBs only.

super_elite.description: iPSAE>=0.67 AND iPTM>=0.8 AND Kd<100nM AND pLDDT>=0.88

function.name: ligandai_recommend_linker
function.description: Get BLI biotinylation linker recommendation for a candidate peptide. Pass pdb_job_id for contact-map-aware orientation analysis.

function.name: ligandai_adaptyv_submit
function.description: Submit top peptide candidates to Adaptyv Foundry for SPPS synthesis + BLI affinity validation. Run ligandai_recommend_linker first to confirm biotin placement.

gene.description: Target gene to look up in the Adaptyv catalogue
